'''Rigard Matl''' was a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] during virtually every major conflict from the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] to the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], fighting on one or the other—or even both—sides of the conflicts.

==Biography==
During the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] War, he served with the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] on [[Eclipse Station]], commanding [[Shocker Squadron]]. When the Jedi attacked and destroyed the Vong [[Operation Safe Passage|blockade]] at [[Talfaglio]], Rigard was shot out of his [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] and forced to evacuate, thus disrupting the rest of his pilots.

Matl was a heavily scarred man; having fought in so many engagements over the years, he had gotten many battle scars.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
